title: What mission won the biggest Astro Awards for 2024?
description:
Welcome to second annual in-person Astro Awards! This took place at the Paramount Theatre, downtown Austin Texas on January 25th and 26th! 

Next year's dates will be announced soon at - http://astroawards.live

Huge thanks to our sponsors who helped make this event possible! 
VAST, Guinn Partners, SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Stoke, Starbase Brewing, Gravitics and Firefly Aerospace

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

All music is original! Find it anywhere you listen to music! (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc)
